query:
SELECT 
  extensivOrderId,
  clientName,
  lifecycleStatus,
  outboundLocation,
  palletCount,
  shipwellOrderId,
  shipwellStatus,
  DATE_FORMAT(shipReadyAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as shipReadyAt,
  DATE_FORMAT(lastSyncedAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as lastSynced
FROM order_tracking
WHERE extensivOrderId = 3389063;
